use_cases: Triggering form submissions in authentication flows
Navigating between pages or sections via call-to-action buttons
Performing destructive actions like deletion with variant styling
Creating ghost-style navigation links within content
Building icon-only buttons for compact toolbars
ai_summary: A foundational button component from shadcn/ui with 6 variant options (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size variants. Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and uses class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Provides accessible focus states and ring styling out of the box.
